meta.provider: Kubernetes kubectl logs (no envelope) — Go text logger
meta.incident: gRPC upstream certificate expiry: TLS handshake errors escalate -> all RPCs to inventory-svc fail -> order fulfillment stalls; recurring distractor: slow S3 presign requests on a separate code path

ground_truth.desc: TLS handshakes to inventory-svc start timing out
Peer TLS certificate on inventory-svc is expired
All gRPC calls to inventory-svc return UNAVAILABLE
Order fulfillment goroutines blocked waiting on inventory
Circuit breaker opens, fast-failing all inventory calls
